name: Read

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/patch.diff
--- /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
+++ /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
@@ -38,6 +38,9 @@
 	##
 
 	access_log /var/log/nginx/access.log;
+	log_format benchmark_log '$time_local $request_method $status "$http_user_agent"';
+
+	limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=benchmark_zone:10m rate=10r/s;
 
 	##
 	# Gzip Settings
EOF
patch /etc/nginx/nginx.conf < /tmp/patch.diff
